items.claim: Damian Pena is an explosive knockout machine with two first-round knockouts in the UFC.
items.quote: Damian Pena is an explosive knockout machine himself. He's got a record of nine wins, one loss. He's two and 0 in the UFC. Both first-round knockouts.

items.claim: Wang Cong is superior to Tracy Cortez on the feet.
items.quote: on the feet, Wang Cong is just going to be too much

items.claim: Luke Riley possesses superior boxing, Thai boxing, footwork, rhythm, and youth compared to Kai Kara-France.
items.quote: the boxing, the Thai boxing, the footwork, the rhythm, and the youth on the side of Luke Riley.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt's power is the last attribute to decline as a fighter ages.
items.quote: Cody Garbrandt has still got the power. That's the last thing to go.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez has begun to doubt himself due to his recent string of losses and draws.
items.quote: when he hasn't reached the level of a Cody Garbrandt, maybe starting to doubt himself.

items.claim: Gable Steveson is an elite athlete with the wrestling, speed, and power to be the future of the heavyweight division.
items.quote: This man could be the future of the heavyweight division. On paper, he's got all of the ingredients what you need.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will be able to absorb strikes better at the light heavyweight limit than he did at middleweight.
items.quote: I think at 205, he'll be able to take a better shot.

items.claim: Terrance McKinney tends to quit or malfunction if his opponent survives his initial offensive storm.
items.quote: if he loses, it's normally after his opponent, kind of like Chris Duncan, weathers an early storm and then I don't know what happens. He has a brain fart, he gives up on himself, he malfunctions

items.claim: Bobby Green's head movement remains effective despite him being 39 years old.
items.quote: 39 years old, but he is not slowing down, not one little bit. The head movement still on point
